message:
beads: expand 8n0rm/crkft/jkcka parents into subtask breakdowns

Adds 20 new subtask beads (.1 through .7 variants) under three
in-progress parents and one new top-level bead. No code changes; this
is pure issue-tracker bookkeeping from a concurrent planning sweep.

Added beads:

- flywheel_connectors-j69z0 (new top-level, open)
- flywheel_connectors-8n0rm.1 through .7 (7 subtasks, open)
- flywheel_connectors-crkft.1 through .5 (5 subtasks, open)
- flywheel_connectors-jkcka.1 through .7 (7 subtasks, open)

Also re-emits the three parent beads 8n0rm, crkft, jkcka. The diff
here is the child→parent `dependencies` array getting populated with
the new parent-child links for the subtasks above. Content of the
parent's description/status/priority fields is unchanged; only the
dependencies section grows. This is the normal jsonl rewrite shape
for br/bd when new dependent rows land under an existing parent.

No commit expected to touch code — verified via
`git diff --name-only` showing .beads/issues.jsonl only.
